original_image_tags: A simple line drawing inside a rectangular frame. A horizontal line represents a baseline or ground. At the left end, a red circle is labeled "Red light". To its right, connected by a short horizontal line, is a small white square labeled "White light". A black horizontal line extends from the white square to the right side of the frame.

elements.description: A simple diagram inside a rectangular box. It shows a horizontal line with a red circle labeled 'Red light' on the left end and a white square labeled 'White light' on the right end. Below the box is the caption: 'Image 1: Recreation of drawing provided by USPER6 of object seen in night vision goggles.'

judge.reason: Description B claims the white square is on the right end, contradicting Description A which correctly places it to the right of the red circle and before a black line extending to the right side.
